items.briefing:
Phishing emails impersonating Microsoft remain the top brand threat this quarter, so staff should be extra cautious with any unexpected emails appearing to come from Microsoft services — this is a known tactic to steal login credentials. Separately, NCC Group is reporting a rise in ransomware attacks alongside growing supply chain risks, meaning threats can reach your organisation through third-party software or vendors, not just direct attacks.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an email prompting you to sign into Microsoft (or any service), go directly to the website by typing the address yourself rather than clicking any links in the email.

featured.title: Origin Energy confirms customer data breach after unauthorised access
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider suffers data breach, directly affecting thousands of local customers.
